name: What evidence do I need to protect my AI chats in a LA divorce case?
description: Only lawyer-directed secure AI might protect—delete personal chats now.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to protect my AI chats in a LA divorce case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Only lawyer-directed secure AI might protect—delete personal chats now.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Lawyer direction + secure enterprise AI; otherwise, none fully protects.[1][3] *Heppner* (NY 2026) rules self-initiated AI chats discoverable in family law, like Texas courts allow broad requests.[1] California bars emphasize supervision.

**Key factors:**
- Attorney must direct use explicitly.[1]
- Closed systems for confidentiality.[7]
- No protection for public tools.[3]

Switch to lawyer-supervised AI only; delete personal chats. In contested divorce, expect device subpoenas.[1] Build case without AI reliance.
